summary: Full E2E testing of 7-step Client Onboarding Wizard. All flows tested: navigation, form input, validation, review, submission, and redirect. All tests passed (100%).
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Review step (step 8) shows 'Step 8 of 8' in header but STEPS array only defines 7 steps + review. This is cosmetically fine but slightly inconsistent with the sidebar which doesn't number Review.
Minor: validateStep() only runs on 'Next' click (step<8). The submit function re-validates but this is duplicated logic.
seed_data_creation: Created 'E2E Test Brand' client via onboarding wizard during test. Also created 'Back Test' client (just navigated away without submitting).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding wizard fully working. All 7 steps + review verified: Step 1 validation (empty name shows error toast), Step 7 validation (no platform selected shows error toast), Back button navigation works and preserves form data, Review step shows all entered data correctly, Submit POSTs to /api/clients/onboard and redirects to /clients with success toast. Quick Add button opens old simple dialog (still working). E2E Test Brand client now exists in DB from test run.
tests_verified: PASS: Onboard Client button on /clients navigates to /onboard
PASS: Step 1 - Enter name, username, whatsapp, email. Click Next
PASS: Step 2 - Enter website, PR link, instagram handle. Click Next
PASS: Step 3 - Fill niche, problem_solved, brand_vibe. Select 'leads' goal. Fill CTA. Click Next
PASS: Step 4 - Fill branding link, drive images, lead magnet. Click Next
PASS: Step 5 - Add keyword, competitor, bio template. Click Next
PASS: Step 6 - Fill voice notes link, not-to-do item. Click Next
PASS: Step 7 - Select 'floating_card' template. Select instagram+linkedin. Click Review
PASS: Review step shows all summary data correctly
PASS: Complete Onboarding submits and redirects to /clients
PASS: E2E Test Brand appears in clients list with correct platforms (IN, LI)
PASS: Quick Add button opens old simple Add New Client dialog
PASS: Back button disabled on step 1, navigates back on step 2+, preserves data
PASS: Clicking Next on Step 1 without name shows error toast
PASS: Clicking Review on Step 7 without platform shows error toast
